greeting: Halt. No one passes without my leave. State your purpose in Ravensgate.
You've wandered into the wrong town, stranger. Lord Ashwick's law is absolute here.
I am Captain Roderick. My blade serves Lord Ashwick and no other.
quest: A band of outlaws camps in the Thornwood. Bring me proof of their end, or don't bother returning.
idle: Lord Ashwick's word is law. Anyone who questions that answers to me.
The prisoners in the tower are none of your concern.
